description_long: This is a modern, multi-functional wooden desk with integrated shelving and storage compartments. The left side features a vertical cabinet with a door, while the right side has three open, curved corner shelves for display or easy access storage. Below the main work surface, there are three pull-out drawers on the left and an open cubby on the right, providing ample space for organizing office supplies or personal items. The upper section includes a large open shelf, ideal for books or decorative objects, and a smaller closed compartment with a white door. The wood grain finish gives the piece a natural, contemporary look, and the metal handles on the drawers and cabinet add a touch of modernity. This desk is suitable for use in home offices, study areas, or urban workspaces.
description: A modern wooden desk with integrated shelves, drawers, and cabinets, featuring a natural wood grain finish and metal handles. It offers multiple storage options including open shelves, a closed cabinet, and pull-out drawers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, left cabinet door, right open shelves, and the upper open shelf with a white door compartment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the layered structure of the desk and shelving.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of the drawers, open cubby, curved corner shelves, and the overall layout of the desk.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the open shelves and the thickness of the work surface and upper shelf.
